exported_ipc.evidence: AndroidManifest.xml: <activity .ExportedForwardActivity android:exported="true"> with no android:permission; onCreate forwards getIntent().getData() via startActivity (smali/com/canary/app/ExportedForwardActivity.smali)

webview_bridge.evidence: WebViewBridgeActivity (exported): setJavaScriptEnabled(true) + addJavascriptInterface(Bridge, "bridge") exposing @JavascriptInterface getToken(), then loadUrl(getIntent().getDataString()) — a caller-controlled URL reaches the bridge (smali/com/canary/app/WebViewBridgeActivity.smali)

build_config_exposure.evidence: AndroidManifest.xml <application> carries android:debuggable="true", android:allowBackup="true", android:usesCleartextTraffic="true" (three terminal build-config classes)

cleartext_tls.evidence: AndroidManifest.xml <application android:usesCleartextTraffic="true"> permits plaintext HTTP app-wide

deeplink_applink.evidence: the exported activity's <intent-filter> is the IPC entry, scored under exported_ipc; no separate App Link / autoVerify surface

pending_intent.evidence: no PendingIntent construction in the fixture smali

insecure_storage.evidence: no SharedPreferences/SQLite/external-storage writes in the fixture smali

dynamic_code_load.evidence: no DexClassLoader/reflection/deserialization in the fixture smali

android_native_code.evidence: no lib/**/*.so in the fixture; no JNI

native_reachable_from_untrusted_input.evidence: no native code present, so the entry->Java->JNI->attacker-arg chain (ADR-1) is not evaluated; the android-native track stays off
